news.t: Tradr Launches First Ever Leveraged ETFs on Archer Aviation and Upstart Holdings

overview.description: The Tradr 2X Long UPST Daily ETF (UPSX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund provides 2x exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement of Upstart Holdings stock. UPSX was launched on Jun 9, 2025 and is issued by Tradr.

data.title: Tradr Launches First Ever Leveraged ETFs on Archer Aviation and Upstart Holdings
data.text: ARCX and UPSX offer 2X Daily Exposure to two captivating growth stories NEW YORK , June 10, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Tradr ETFs, a provider of ETFs designed for sophisticated investors and professional tr...
